title: iberis linifolia subsp. timeroyi
intro: Iberis linifolia subsp. timeroyi, also known as the 'Cretan candytuft', is a plant species within the Iberis genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The herbal preparations of Iberis linifolia subsp. timeroyi include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
